name: devai-aidd-guard
description: DevAI AIDD Guard plugin for opencode-based DevAI environments.

scripts.pack: npm run build && npm run release
scripts.test: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/policies/legacy/devai-git-workflo.js && node --check scripts/build.js && node --check scripts/make-release.js && node tests/regression.test.js && node tests/e2e/scenario-workflow-detection.test.js && node tests/e2e/scenario-readiness-not-initialized.test.js && node tests/e2e/scenario-approval-deny-recovery.test.js && node tests/e2e/scenario-file-edited-tracking.test.js
